prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-FLEX-SHAFT-GRINDER-979FSG Product Type: ROTARY_TOOL Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool 55PC Flex Shaft Grinder Set Polishing Carving Drilling Buffing Description: The Universal Tool Flexible Shaft Grinder, Chuck, Pedal, Switch is used for carving, buffing, drilling, polishing, sanding, cutting, cleaning, grinding, and more while jewelry making, model making, woodworking, and more. Hang the motor overhead and use the flexible shaft grinder to work your way around your work. The foot pedal controls the speed.
The set also includes Power of 1/4 HP, 40 Accessories, 1/4 HP, Max 22,000 RPM, 5/32-Inch Chuck, and Blow Mold Case

The flex shaft grinder set will prove to be useful for all kinds of jewelers and jewelry artists. This machine makes work easy, reduces effort, increases production, and can be used for a variety of tasks such as drilling, sanding, grinding, buffing, and polishing. Search Terms: 1/8 rotary tool complete workbench set up home DIY jewelry craft hobby wood burning iconography Christmas gift crafting design accessory use Features: - COMPLETE WORKBENCH ROTARY TOOL KIT: Complete 55 piece hand held flex shaft rotary tool set includes all working accessories needed to make your next DIY project become a reality including all polish, cutting and abrasive burrs to get started. - EASE OF USE COMPONENTS: Variable speed foot pedal allows you to match the speed of the rotary tool with the application at hand, hands-free and easy to control | Hanging Power Motor with Flex Shaft adapter pen that allows for precision use and added dexterity in intricate spaces - Engraver pen, detail sander, glass etcher, and mini polisher have a max speed of 22,000 RPM - ACCESSORIES INCLUDED - (15) Stone Burrs, (1) Brass Collet, (2) Diamond Burrs, (2) Drills, (3) Cut off Wheels, (5) Sanding Bands, (3) Wool Polishing Wheels,(4) Adjustment Tools, (1) Foot Control Pedal, (1) Jacobs Chuck No. 30 Type Hand Piece, AND (2) Replacement Springs - Ideal for precision detail work. Hobby, Woodworking, DIY, Crafting, Jewelers, Artisans, Metal Smiths. Excellent for carving, buffing, polishing, sanding, cutting, cleaning, drilling, adding patterns and texture while reaching small spaces. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 55PC Flex Shaft Grinder Set Polishing Carving
